jiuwen.core.session

jiuwen.core.session#

Session#

class jiuwen.core.session.Session#

Conversation memory for multi-turn agents.

add_message(role: str, content: str) → None#
get_messages() → list[dict]#
clear() → None#
set_state(key: str, value) → None#
get_state(key: str, default=None) → Any#
__len__() → int#

StreamEmitter#

class jiuwen.core.session.StreamEmitter#

Async stream for real-time agent output.

async emit(chunk) -> None
async close() -> None
async __aiter__() -> AsyncIterator
